cannibalizationGuardrails.note: Read-only cannibalization brief for current review candidates. It does not edit titles, slugs, keywords, status, noindex, or publishing state.
cannibalizationGuardrails.stopBefore: Use recommendations during human review only. Publishing still requires separate explicit approval.
